releaseNotes: New Inventory System: Manage all your purchased items in one place!
Item Management: Activate, deactivate, or delete items from your library.
Repurchase Logic: Deleting an item returns it to the shop for repurchase.
Buy One Get One Free: Every gift purchase now includes a bonus gift!
Expanded Shop: Added Golden Chest, Lucky Clover, Party Popper, and Diamond Box.
Improved Navigation: Library icon now leads to your personal inventory.
